description: Determines the character of city districts for map building.

descriptionTranslations.en: Determines the character of city districts for map building.

entries.result: Economic: This District is a haven for business interests of one sort or another. This could be commercial, such as marketplaces where people buy things, or headquarters for business entities... anything that touches on economics

resultTranslations.en: Economic: This District is a haven for business interests of one sort or another. This could be commercial, such as marketplaces where people buy things, or headquarters for business entities... anything that touches on economics

entries.result: Food: Food is made here, either grown and farmed, harvested in vats, fished from rivers, or however this world sustains people

resultTranslations.en: Food: Food is made here, either grown and farmed, harvested in vats, fished from rivers, or however this world sustains people

entries.result: Domestic: This District is home to many people and is known for its neighborhoods

resultTranslations.en: Domestic: This District is home to many people and is known for its neighborhoods

entries.result: Industry: This District is known for producing things at scale (or at least, at maximum scale for what this city can manage), such as being home to factories. The things made here are likely shipped somewhere else to sell

resultTranslations.en: Industry: This District is known for producing things at scale (or at least, at maximum scale for what this city can manage), such as being home to factories. The things made here are likely shipped somewhere else to sell

entries.result: Leisure: This District is known for things that people enjoy. For instance, it may be full of popular restaurants or zoos or other entertainments and leisure opportunities

resultTranslations.en: Leisure: This District is known for things that people enjoy. For instance, it may be full of popular restaurants or zoos or other entertainments and leisure opportunities

entries.result: Government: This District is home to important governing institutions for the City, such as judicial, legislative, and law enforcement

resultTranslations.en: Government: This District is home to important governing institutions for the City, such as judicial, legislative, and law enforcement

entries.result: Another Keyword: Roll an additional Keyword from City Descriptors and include it with the other Meaning words rolled to make your interpretation

resultTranslations.en: Another Keyword: Roll an additional Keyword from City Descriptors and include it with the other Meaning words rolled to make your interpretation
